rationale: Initial discovery pass on prompt 'build me a web app to play blackjack'. Captured 13 assumptions defaulting to single-player vs computer dealer, client-only static web app, play-money chips, standard rules. Logged 2 inflection points (betting model, hand-action surface) with conventional defaults. Listed 15 out-of-scope items to bound downstream scope creep.

Resolved both ledger inflections via quick reasoning (rubric all four conditions met for each): IP1 locked to bankroll+per-hand-bets with 1000-chip starting pool and min bet 5; IP2 locked to full common actions (hit/stand/double/split) with S17 dealer, six-deck shoe per session, no resplits, split aces get one card each. Decomposed into 5 sections following the controller-and-shell pattern from the tic-tac-toe lesson: rules-engine (pure logic), betting-and-bankroll (pure chip math), ui-render (pure DOM render), controller-and-shell (owns index.html and orchestration), edge-case-testing (sandbox-driven, depends on integrator pseudo-node). Wrote 3 interface contracts pinning module global names (window.RulesEngine, window.Bankroll, window.UIRender) and exact script filenames (rules-engine.js, bankroll.js, ui-render.js, controller.js, styles.css) so Integrator has zero glue work. Stable DOM ids fixed in the ui-render contract so controller can bind events without coordination.

Coordinator booted in inline dispatch mode. Built DAG: 5 section nodes + 1 integrator pseudo-node. Wave 1 (no deps): rules-engine, betting-and-bankroll, ui-render. Wave 2: controller-and-shell. Wave 3: integrator. Wave 4: edge-case-testing. Read all 3 controller-facing contracts before any building.
rules-engine, betting-and-bankroll, ui-render all built and node-checked. Section state files transitioned active->verified. Wave 2 unblocked.
controller-and-shell built (controller.js + index.html). Script load order verified to match contract. Wave 3 unblocked.
Copied 6 files (index.html, rules-engine.js, bankroll.js, ui-render.js, styles.css, controller.js) into output/integration/. No glue code needed because contracts pinned exact filenames and globals.
edge-case-testing built sandbox + tests. node tests/run.js -> 14/14 pass. All sections verified, integrator verified, run complete.
